tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All basic metabolic and renal parameters are within normal limits. Glycemic control is adequate. Lipid profile shows elevated total and LDL cholesterol and low HDL cholesterol, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Recommend lipid-lowering therapy and lifestyle modification. No evidence of renal dysfunction or microalbuminuria. Regular follow-up advised.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
